raw.subject: Something I noticed about Tink's B & B
raw.body:
Hi,

These two adorable furry friends stole my heart, and I couldn't help but smile.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might cost you bookings from potential guests who prefer to plan ahead.

I sketched a quick page idea from your Facebook, featuring a services overview, a photo gallery showcasing your furry friends, and a contact section to make it easy for guests to get in touch.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/tink-s-b-b-clarksville

I'd love to discuss how a simple website can help you reach more guests and grow your business. For local businesses like yours, I offer a flat fee that fits your needs.
